15 Recipes
🍗 Chicken

Butter Chicken

دجاج بالزبدة
Restaurant-Style · Basmati Rice & Naan
60 SR
PART 1 — CHICKEN MARINADE
IngredientQuantityNotes
Chicken Breast500gCut into cubes
Garlic Paste1 tbspFresh preferred
Ginger Paste1 tbspFresh preferred
Yogurt3 tbspFull-fat, plain
Tandoori Masala1½ tsp
Garam Masala½ tsp
Kasuri Methi (Dried Fenugreek)1 tspRub between palms before adding
White Pepper¼ tsp
SaltTo taste
  1. Combine all marinade ingredients and mix well until chicken is fully coated.
  2. Cover and refrigerate for minimum 2 hours, ideally overnight.
  3. Remove from fridge 20 minutes before cooking.
PART 2 — BUTTER SAUCE
IngredientQuantityNotes
Butter3–4 tbspUse same brand throughout
Onion2 mediumChopped, then blended
Tomatoes3 mediumChopped, then blended
Ginger Paste1 tsp
Garlic Paste1 tsp
Garam Masala½ tsp
Salt & White PepperTo taste
Cashew Milk½ cupSoak cashews → blend → strain
Tomato Sauce2 tbspOptional — deepens colour
Fresh Cream3–4 tbspAdd at end, do not boil
Kasuri Methi1 tspCrush before adding
Sugar½ tspTo balance acidity
Extra Butter1 tbspFinish for richness
PART 3 — COOK PROCEDURE
  1. Heat butter in wide pan. Add marinated chicken on low-medium flame, turning each piece until fully cooked and slightly charred. Remove and set aside.
  2. In same pan, add remaining butter. Sauté ginger and garlic paste 1 min. Add ground onion, cook until golden (8–10 min).
  3. Add ground tomatoes. Cook until oil separates (~10 min). Add garam masala, salt, pepper and tomato sauce. Stir well.
  4. Optional: blend sauce until smooth and strain back into pan.
  5. Pour in strained cashew milk. Stir and simmer on low for 5 minutes.
  6. Return cooked chicken to sauce. Simmer together 5–7 minutes.
  7. Reduce heat to very low. Stir in fresh cream and extra butter. Do not boil.
  8. Add sugar, crush kasuri methi between palms and sprinkle in. Taste and adjust salt.
  9. Plate in copper/steel dish. Garnish with swirl of cream, cashews and fresh coriander. Serve hot with basmati rice and naan.
🍗 Chicken

Quesadilla Chicken

كيسادياـ الدجاج
Served with Fries & Three Dipping Sauces
65 SR
CHICKEN FILLING
  • Chicken Breast
  • Black Pepper
  • White Pepper
  • Salt
  • Sweet Paprika
  • Sweet Chilli Sauce — add last
  • Mozzarella Cheese
  • Flour Tortilla
  1. Season chicken with black pepper, white pepper, salt and sweet paprika.
  2. Cook until golden. Add sweet chilli sauce last.
  3. Fill tortilla with chicken and mozzarella, fold and grill until crispy.
  4. Cut into triangles.
SAUCE 1 — AVOCADO SAUCE
  • Fresh Avocado
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Lemon Juice
  1. Mash avocado. Add salt, pepper and lemon juice. Mix well.
SAUCE 2 — TOMATO SALSA
  • Chopped Tomato
  • Coriander
  • Salt
  • Crushed Black Pepper
  • Olive Oil
  1. Mix all ingredients together. Keep chunky. Serve fresh.
SAUCE 3 — LABNEH DIP
  • Labneh
  • Salt
  • Vinegar
  • Lemon Juice
  • Crushed Black Pepper
  1. Mix all ingredients until smooth. Chill before serving.
🍗 Chicken

Spicy Chicken Wings

أجنحة دجاج حارة
Oven Roasted · Buffalo Honey Glaze · Coleslaw · Fries
56 SR
PART 1 — MARINATE & COOK
  • Chicken Wings — 8 pcs
  • Soy Sauce
  • Sweet Soy Sauce
  • Brown Sugar
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Ginger Powder
  1. Cut chicken wings into 8 pieces per order.
  2. Marinate with soy sauce, sweet soy sauce, brown sugar, salt, pepper and ginger powder.
  3. Cook in oven until fully done.
PART 2 — SAUCE, PLATE & SERVE
  • Buffalo Sauce
  • Sweet Chili Sauce
  • Honey
  • French Fries
  • Coleslaw
  • Fresh Parsley
  1. Mix buffalo sauce, sweet chili and honey together.
  2. Toss cooked wings in the sauce until well coated.
  3. Plate wings on a round plate with french fries.
  4. Serve with coleslaw and sweet chili sauce on the side.
  5. Garnish with fresh parsley on top.
🍗 Chicken

Chicken Fries Buffalo

دجاج مع البطاطس بالباقلو
Buffalo Chicken · French Fries · Ranch Sauce
54 SR
COMPONENTS
  • Regular French Fries
  • Chicken Strips — our regular recipe
  • Buffalo Sauce — our existing sauce
  • Ranch Sauce — our existing sauce
  • Fresh Parsley — chopped
  1. Fry regular French fries. Place on plate.
  2. Fry chicken strips as per our regular recipe.
  3. When chicken strips are ready, cut into cubes.
  4. Dip chicken strips into buffalo sauce until fully coated.
  5. Place buffalo chicken on top of French fries.
  6. Apply ranch sauce on top using squeeze bottle.
  7. Finish with chopped fresh parsley.
🍗 Chicken

Fried Chicken Salad

سلطة الدجاج مع الخضار
Crispy Fried Chicken · Mixed Greens · Lemon Dressing · Caesar Sauce
59 SR
PART 1 — FRIED CHICKEN
  • Chicken Breast
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Seasoning
  • Flour
  • Egg
  • Breadcrumbs
  • Oil — for frying
  1. Season chicken with salt, pepper and seasoning.
  2. Coat chicken in flour.
  3. Dip in beaten egg.
  4. Coat with breadcrumbs.
  5. Fry in oil until golden and fully cooked.
  6. Slice and place on top of salad.
PART 2 — SALAD & SERVE
  • Mixed Greens
  • Lettuce
  • Black Olive
  • Cherry Tomato
  • Sun Dried Tomato
  • Sliced Parmesan Cheese
  • Lemon Dressing
  • Caesar Sauce
  1. Place mixed greens and lettuce in a bowl.
  2. Add black olive, cherry tomato, sun dried tomato and sliced Parmesan.
  3. Drizzle lemon dressing over the salad and toss.
  4. Place sliced fried chicken on top.
  5. Drizzle Caesar sauce over the chicken and serve.
🍝 Pasta

Burrata Tomato Pasta

إسباجيتي بصوص الطماطم والبوراتا
Spaghetti · Pink Tomato Cream Sauce · Burrata · Parmesan
68 SR
PINK SAUCE
  • Spaghetti — cooked al dente
  • Olive Oil
  • Garlic — chopped
  • Cherry Tomato — cut, sautéed
  • Tomato Sauce
  • Fresh Cream
  • Butter — add later
  • Salt & Pepper
  • Fresh Basil Leaves
  1. Cook spaghetti al dente. Drain and set aside.
  2. Heat olive oil. Sauté garlic until golden.
  3. Add cherry tomatoes and cook until soft.
  4. Add tomato sauce and cream. Simmer until pink sauce forms.
  5. Add butter. Season with salt and pepper.
  6. Toss spaghetti in the pink sauce. Add fresh basil.
TOPPING & FINISHING
  • Burrata Cheese — placed in centre on top
  • Parmesan Cheese — grated on top
  • Fresh Basil Leaves — garnish
  • Black Pepper — dusted on burrata
  • Olive Oil — drizzle
  1. Plate the pasta. Place burrata in the centre.
  2. Grate parmesan on top. Dust with black pepper. Drizzle olive oil.
  3. Garnish with fresh basil leaves.
🍝 Pasta

Fettuccine Pesto Truffle

فيتوتشيني بيستو بالترفل
Fettuccine · Pesto Truffle Cream · Porcini Mushroom · Parmesan
70 SR
INGREDIENTS
  • Fettuccine Pasta
  • Cream
  • Pesto Truffle Sauce
  • Dried Porcini Mushroom
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Parmesan Cheese
  • Truffle Slices
  1. Boil fettuccine pasta until al dente. Drain and set aside.
  2. Soak dried porcini mushroom in warm water before use. Drain and set aside.
  3. Add cream and pesto truffle sauce to pan. Season with salt and pepper.
  4. Toss pasta in the sauce, add mushrooms and mix well.
  5. Plate in a black bowl, twirl pasta in center.
  6. Finish with grated Parmesan and truffle slices on top.
🍝 Pasta

Cannelloni Ricotta

كانيلوني بالريكوتا
Spinach & Ricotta Filled Pasta · Fresh Tomato Sauce · Parmesan
FILLING
  • Spinach — cooked with onion, dried and chopped fine
  • Ricotta Cheese
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  1. Cook spinach with onion until wilted. Drain and dry well. Chop fine. Mix with ricotta cheese, salt and pepper.
TOMATO SAUCE
  • Fresh Tomato — cut small and squashed (or tomato paste)
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Olive Oil
  • Fresh Basil Leaves — cut small
  1. Squash fresh tomatoes. Add olive oil, salt, pepper and fresh basil. Mix well.
ASSEMBLY & COOKING
  • Cannelloni Pasta — boiled to semi well done
  • Parmesan Cheese — grated on top
  1. Boil cannelloni pasta to semi well done. Drain and cool before filling.
  2. Fill cooled cannelloni tubes with the spinach and ricotta mixture.
  3. Pour tomato sauce on the base of the plate or baking dish.
  4. Place filled cannelloni on top of the sauce.
  5. Grate parmesan cheese generously on top.
  6. Finish under the salamander until golden and cheese is melted.
  7. Garnish with fresh basil leaves and serve immediately.
🐟 Seafood

Asian Glazed Salmon

سلمون مشوي بصوص الصويا
Oven Roasted Salmon · Asian Glaze · Mashed Potato · Seasonal Vegetables
95 SR
PART 1 — MARINATE & COOK
  • Salmon Fillet
  • Sweet Chili Sauce
  • Sweet Soy Sauce
  • Ginger Powder
  • Garlic Powder
  1. Marinate salmon with sweet chili, sweet soy sauce, ginger powder and garlic powder.
  2. Cook in oven until fully done.
PART 2 — ASIAN GLAZE SAUCE
  • Sweet Chili Sauce
  • Sweet Soy Sauce
  • Soy Sauce
  • Honey
  1. Mix sweet chili sauce, sweet soy sauce, soy sauce and a little honey together.
  2. Heat until slightly thickened.
  3. Pour sauce around and over the salmon before serving.
PART 3 — PLATE & SERVE
  • Mashed Potato
  • Broccoli
  • Baby Corn
  1. Place mashed potato in the center of the plate.
  2. Arrange broccoli and baby corn on the side.
  3. Place glazed salmon on top of the mashed potato.
  4. Pour Asian glaze sauce around the plate and serve.
🐟 Seafood

Teriyaki Salmon Cubes With Rice

مكعبات السلمون تيريياكي مع الأرز
Grilled Salmon Cubes · Teriyaki Sauce · Basmati Rice · Rocket
88 SR
PART 1 — SALMON
  • Salmon Fillet — cut into cubes
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  1. Cut salmon into cubes.
  2. Season with salt and pepper.
  3. Grill until fully cooked.
PART 2 — TERIYAKI SAUCE
  • Sweet Soy Sauce
  • Sweet Chili Sauce
  • Soy Sauce
  1. Mix sweet soy sauce, sweet chili sauce and soy sauce together.
  2. Heat until slightly thickened.
PART 3 — PLATE & SERVE
  • Cooked Basmati Rice
  • Fresh Rocca
  1. Mold basmati rice in the center of the plate.
  2. Stack grilled salmon cubes on top of the rice.
  3. Pour teriyaki sauce around the plate.
  4. Garnish with fresh rocca on top and serve.
🥩 Meat

Lamb Tenderloin

لحم فيليه الغنم مع صوص النبيذ الأحمر
Served with Basmati Rice, Grilled Red Pepper & Potato Cake
90 SR
LAMB TENDERLOIN
  • Lamb Tenderloin — 2 pcs, cut to 2 pieces each
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Steak Seasoning
  1. Season lamb with salt, pepper and steak seasoning. Grill to desired doneness.
POTATO CAKE
  • Boiled Potato — crushed small
  • Salt & Pepper
  • 1 Egg
  • Parmesan Cheese
  • Parsley — finely chopped
  1. Mix mashed potato with egg, parmesan, parsley, salt and pepper. Shape into a block. Grill until golden on both sides.
RED WINE SAUCE
  • Demi-glace
  • Red Wine
  • Crushed Black Pepper
  1. Heat demi-glace, add red wine and crushed black pepper. Simmer until sauce thickens.
PLATING
  1. Place basmati rice and grilled red pepper on the plate.
  2. Add potato cake on the side.
  3. Place grilled lamb tenderloin in the centre.
  4. Pour red wine sauce over the lamb. Garnish with parsley.
🥩 Meat

Ribeye Steak

ريب آي ستيك
Charcoal Grilled · Herb Butter · Pepper Red Wine Sauce
RIBEYE STEAK
  • Ribeye Steak
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Steak Seasoning
  1. Season ribeye with salt, pepper and steak seasoning. Cook on charcoal to desired doneness.
MASHED POTATO
  • Potato
  • Butter
  • Cream
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Garlic Powder
  1. Boil potatoes until soft. Mash with butter, cream, salt, pepper and garlic powder until smooth and creamy.
HERB BUTTER
  • Butter — softened
  • Thyme — chopped
  • Rosemary — chopped
  • Salt
  • Crushed Pepper
  1. Mix all ingredients into softened butter. Roll in cling film into a round disc shape. Chill until firm. Slice and place on top of hot steak to serve.
PEPPER SAUCE WITH RED WINE
  • Demi-glace
  • Red Wine
  • Crushed Black Pepper
  1. Heat demi-glace, add red wine and crushed black pepper. Simmer until sauce thickens.
PLATING
  • Boiled Potato with Skin
  • Boiled Carrot
  • Boiled Broccoli
  1. Place mashed potato on the plate. Pour pepper sauce over it.
  2. Place ribeye steak alongside the mashed potato.
  3. Arrange boiled potato, carrot and broccoli on the side.
  4. Place herb butter disc on top of the hot steak.
🥩 Meat

Smash Glazed Burger

برجر الأنجوس مهروس مع بصل مكرمل
Served with Fries
68 SR
MEAT PATTY
  • Beef Patty — smashed
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Burger Seasoning
  1. Season beef patty with salt, pepper and burger seasoning. Smash flat on a hot griddle and cook until crispy edged.
BURGER ARRANGEMENT — Bottom to Top
LayerComponent
1Bottom Bun
2Burger Sauce
3Meat Patty
4Cheddar Cheese
5Meat Patty
6Caramelized Onion
7Burger Sauce
8Top Bun
BURGER SAUCE
  • Mayonnaise
  • Tomato Ketchup
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Garlic Powder
  • Onion Powder
  • Lemon Juice
  • Mustard Sauce
  • Jalapeño — blended
  • Sweet Chilli Sauce
  1. Mix all ingredients together until smooth. Refrigerate until needed.
SIDE SAUCE — RANCH
  • Mayonnaise
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Vinegar / Lemon Juice
  1. Mix all ingredients together until smooth. Chill before serving.
🍮 Dessert

French Toast Tiramisu

التوست الفرنسي بالتيراميسو
French Toast · Tiramisu Cream · Caramel Sauce · Fresh Strawberry
40 SR
TIRAMISU CREAM
  • 5 Egg Yolks
  • 200g Sugar
  • 200g Mascarpone Cheese
  • Vanilla Powder
  • 200g Whipping Cream
  1. Whip egg yolks and sugar in machine until foamy.
  2. Add mascarpone and vanilla powder. Mix until combined. Set aside.
  3. Whip 200g whipping cream in machine until creamy.
  4. Fold the egg yolk mixture into the whipped cream. Mix together. Cream is ready.
ASSEMBLY
  • Caramel Sauce — pour on plate
  • French Toast — place on top
  • Tiramisu Cream — pipe on top using pastry bag
  • Cocoa Powder — dust on top
  • Fresh Strawberry — garnish on top
  1. Pour caramel sauce on the plate.
  2. Place French Toast on top of the caramel sauce.
  3. Pipe tiramisu cream on top using pastry bag.
  4. Dust with cocoa powder.
  5. Garnish with fresh strawberry on top.
🍽️ Side Item

Caramelized Onion

بصل مكرمل
Slow Cooked · Butter · Brown Sugar
INGREDIENTS
  • Onion — sliced
  • Vegetable Oil
  • Butter
  • Brown Sugar — add at last
METHOD
  1. Heat vegetable oil and butter in a pan on low heat.
  2. Add sliced onion and cook on low heat until golden and caramelized.
  3. Add brown sugar at the end. Stir well and serve.
